title: GitHub Workflows Get Fresh New Fixes

topics.title: Workflow Improvements
topics.summary: Recent updates to the GitHub workflows include fixing the first-time contributor welcome workflow by adding a missing token, ensuring new contributors can interact without issues. Additionally, improvements were made to the externals configuration in Chromatic to reduce unnecessary snapshot usage.

topics.title: UI Enhancements
topics.summary: The UI of the Maintainers section has been improved by adding a top margin to the 'show more/fewer' button, enhancing visual clarity. This change addresses user experience by preventing the button from appearing cramped against the last maintainer's name.

topics.title: Internationalization Updates
topics.summary: Missing translations for the Hindi (hi-IN) language have been added to improve accessibility and user experience for Hindi-speaking users. This update ensures that the application is more inclusive and caters to a broader audience.

topics.title: Community Engagement
topics.summary: Engagement with the community is highlighted through posts on Bluesky, including a new blog post announcement and an invitation to explore Vite's new plugin registry. These initiatives aim to foster interaction and keep users informed about updates.
